title: Faithful Legacy
body:
## Info
This resource pack adds [Faithful 32x](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/faithful-32x) and [Classic Faithful 32x](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/classic-faithful-32x) support for Legacy4J, this changes the user interface to be more like Faithful, some of the textures like the buttons in this resource pack was made by the Faithful Team, so please support them [(Faithful Website)](https://faithfulpack.net). Resource pack made by NicSonic. Double the textures for LCE.
